---
title: "Cubit phone convo 1"
format: revealjs
---

##

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_05.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>

::: notes
C: Hello, it is I, Cubit Zenom, King of the zombies. 
AF: Hi.
:::

## 

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_06.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>


::: notes
C: I took your results to Azal and he said you have done a foolish thing.
AF: Really?
:::

## 

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_07.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>

::: notes

C: I need you to take another look.
AF: Ok, leave it with me.
:::

## 

<video
  data-autoplay
  src="media/cubit_facetime_live_lecture_08.mp4"
  width="100%"
  height="100%" 
></video>


::: notes
C: Bye!
:::
